languages.text: "Мои приближенные понимают, насколько лживы эти обвинения. Иначе быть не может".
"My confidants understand the utter baselessness of these allegations. How could they not?"
languages.original_text: "Мои приближенные понимают, насколько лживы эти обвинения. Иначе быть не может".

traits.locale_text: "My confidants understand the utter baselessness of these allegations. How could they not?"
"My confidants understand the utter baselessness of these allegations. How could they not?"
"My confidants understand the utter baselessness of these allegations. How could they not?"

languages.text: “我的心腹们怎么可能不明白？这些都是毫无根据的指控。”
languages.original_text: "My confidants understand the utter baselessness of these allegations. How could they not?"

traits.locale_text: “我的心腹们怎么可能不明白？这些都是毫无根据的指控。”

languages.text: « Mes confidents ont pleinement conscience du caractère infondé de telles allégations. Comment pourrait-il en être autrement ? »
languages.original_text: "My confidants understand the utter baselessness of these allegations. How could they not?"

traits.locale_text: « Mes confidents ont pleinement conscience du caractère infondé de telles allégations. Comment pourrait-il en être autrement ? »

languages.text: "Sırdaşlarım bu iddiaların tamamen asılsız olduğunun farkında. Nasıl olmasınlar ki?"
languages.original_text: "My confidants understand the utter baselessness of these allegations. How could they not?"

traits.locale_text: "Sırdaşlarım bu iddiaların tamamen asılsız olduğunun farkında. Nasıl olmasınlar ki?"

languages.text: «Mis confidentes entienden perfectamente que estas acusaciones carecen de fundamento. ¿Cómo no iban a verlo?».
languages.original_text: "My confidants understand the utter baselessness of these allegations. How could they not?"

traits.locale_text: «Mis confidentes entienden perfectamente que estas acusaciones carecen de fundamento. ¿Cómo no iban a verlo?».

languages.text: "Meine Vertrauten wissen, dass diese Vorwürfe jeder Grundlage entbehren. Wie könnte es auch anders sein?"
languages.original_text: "My confidants understand the utter baselessness of these allegations. How could they not?"

traits.locale_text: "Meine Vertrauten wissen, dass diese Vorwürfe jeder Grundlage entbehren. Wie könnte es auch anders sein?"

languages.text: 「私の側近たちは、これらの告発が全く根拠のないことを理解しています。なぜ理解しないはずでしょう？」
languages.original_text: "My confidants understand the utter baselessness of these allegations. How could they not?"

traits.locale_text: 「私の側近たちは、これらの告発が全く根拠のないことを理解しています。なぜ理解しないはずでしょう？」
